name: @metorial/sendfox
description: Manage email marketing for content creators. Create, update, and delete contacts, lists, campaigns, automations, and subscription forms. Send or schedule email campaigns with HTML content and track performance statistics including opens, clicks, bounces, and unsubscribes. Batch import up to 1,000 contacts at once. Build email automations with triggers and timed sequences. Define custom contact fields, manage sender domains, and view subscriber engagement metrics.
